name: Stampli
tagline: #1 procure-to-pay platform with AI-powered AP automation
description: Stampli is a leading procure-to-pay platform powered by AI for accounts payable automation, procurement, payments, vendor management, and credit cards. Its AI identifies correct approvers, sends notifications, automates reminders, and keeps all documents centralized. The platform streamlines the entire invoice approval process.
cons: Can be complex for small teams
